Name: Content Pipeline
Description: Research a topic then draft and edit a publish-ready blog post or article
Prompts Used: Technical Concept Explainer -> Blog Post Outline Generator -> Technical Blog Post Writer -> Email Draft Polisher
Notes: Most-used workflow. Step 4 repurposed as a general polish step.

Name: Code Review Cycle
Description: Scan code for issues then generate fixes and test coverage
Prompts Used: Python Code Reviewer -> Refactoring Advisor -> Test Generation Suite -> Bug Report Template
Notes: Works best with Python and TypeScript. Adapt the first prompt for other languages.

Name: Market Research Sprint
Description: Define market scope then gather and analyse competitive intelligence
Prompts Used: Market Research Brief -> Competitor Analysis Framework -> Competitive Intelligence Gatherer -> SWOT Analysis Generator
Notes: Time-intensive but thorough. Use for quarterly strategic planning.

Name: Data Analysis Flow
Description: Clean and analyse a dataset then generate insights and recommendations
Prompts Used: Data Cleaning Instructions -> CSV Data Summariser -> Trend Analysis Report -> KPI Dashboard Builder
Notes: Step 1 generates instructions -- you execute them manually then feed clean data to Step 2.

Name: Client Proposal Builder
Description: Build a complete client proposal from scope to pricing to follow-up
Prompts Used: Strategy Document Outliner -> Client Proposal Writer -> Email Sequence Builder
Notes: Step 3 generates the follow-up email sequence post-submission.

Name: Weekly Newsletter
Description: Plan and write a newsletter edition from topic selection to send-ready
Prompts Used: Content Calendar Planner -> Newsletter Draft Writer -> Email Subject Line Tester
Notes: Highest success rate workflow. Runs like clockwork every Tuesday morning.

Name: Social Media Batch
Description: Plan and write a week of social media content in one session
Prompts Used: Content Calendar Planner -> Social Media Thread Writer -> Tagline Generator
Notes: Batch a full week of posts in one sitting. Tagline generator provides CTA options.

Name: Bug Triage
Description: Document investigate and plan fixes for reported bugs
Prompts Used: Bug Report Template -> Debug Assistant -> Task Breakdown Specialist
Notes: Fast turnaround workflow. Usually done within a single work session.

Name: Product Launch
Description: Generate all launch materials from positioning to outreach
Prompts Used: Audience Persona Builder -> Landing Page Copy Generator -> Email Sequence Builder -> Social Media Thread Writer -> Facebook Ad Copy Generator
Notes: Long workflow -- consider splitting across two days. Steps 4-5 can run in parallel.

Name: Competitor Audit
Description: Deep dive into a specific competitor's strategy and positioning
Prompts Used: Competitive Intelligence Gatherer -> Competitor Analysis Framework -> SWOT Analysis Generator
Notes: Feed each step's output into the next for compounding depth.

Name: Monthly Report
Description: Compile monthly business performance into a presentation-ready report
Prompts Used: CSV Data Summariser -> Financial Report Interpreter -> Quarterly Business Review Prep -> Presentation Deck Outliner
Notes: Despite the name the QBR prompt works fine for monthly reviews with minor context changes.

Name: Email Campaign
Description: Plan and write a multi-touch email campaign
Prompts Used: Audience Persona Builder -> Email Sequence Builder -> Email Subject Line Tester -> Landing Page Copy Generator
Notes: Step 4 generates the landing page the emails drive to. Test subject lines with your ESP's A/B tool.
